title: Table 4 in A new genus and three new species of mangrove slugs from the Indo-West Pacific (Mollusca: Gastropoda: Euthyneura: Onchidiidae)
author: Dayrat, Benoît
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Table 4.  Radular formulae for the five species of  Paromoionchis  gen. nov. following the same format: number of rows × (number of lateral teeth per left half row - 1 rachidian tooth - number of lateral teeth per right half row). Each DNA extraction number corresponds to one particular individual. DNA extraction numbers are used on Figs 1–4 (the phylogenetic trees), Table 1 and in the material examined section for each species.
